title: How to Live Harmoniously with Devotees | Sri Amitasana Dasa | SB 6.10.9 | 24.04.2025
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: If one is unhappy to see the distress of other living beings
and happy to see their happiness,
his religious principles are appreciated as imperishable
by exalted persons who are considered pious and benevolent.

and happy to see their happiness,
his religious principles are appreciated as imperishable

one generally follows different types of religious principles

by the modes of material nature.

and happy to see others happy.

We feel pain when someone disturbs us
and therefore we should not inflict pain upon other living beings.
